title: Reform Government

text:
President Trump has driven sweeping reforms to eliminate waste, reduce bureaucracy, and restore accountability across the federal government. In 2025, agencies were streamlined, unnecessary regulations rolled back, and taxpayer dollars redirected toward core national priorities. The result is a leaner, more effective government that works for the American people—not the bureaucracy.
By modernizing operations, improving oversight, and holding agencies accountable for results, the administration is restoring trust in how government serves the public. These reforms ensure federal programs are efficient, transparent, and focused on delivering real value to taxpayers—making government smaller, smarter, and more responsive to the needs of the American people.
